column8: Clay with cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite and steel bars. (FILL)

Strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, slightly decomposed medium to coarse-grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained joints, dipping 70 degrees, 20 degrees*, 85 degrees
21.45m-22.90m: Moderately strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse-grained GRANITE.
